provenance.dropped_services_note: apps/firm VendorIndexEntry requires a string capability and a price per service; services missing either are dropped here so they cannot invalidate the whole index. They remain in the raw scan.
provenance.capability_inference: keyword rules in tools/vendor-index/generate.js; every service carries capability_source
provenance.token_decimals: looked up per fee token via `onchainos token info`; never assumed
provenance.kya_base_score: SUBSTITUTED from marketplace feedbackRate because apps/kya is absent from this repo (ALLOW_FEEDBACK_RATE_AS_BASE_SCORE=true)

services.description:
Search prediction markets across Polymarket and other supported venues; returns matched market metadata for trading and research agents.
Provide: 1. q (search query). Optional: status, venue, limit.

Return exact matched prediction-market pairs across venues with cross-venue pricing context for arbitrage and comparison agents.
Provide: none required. Optional: active_only, min_similarity, sort_by, venue, limit.

Return a complete Predexon smart-wallet profile for a Polymarket wallet, including performance metrics and trading style.
Provide: 1. wallet (Polymarket wallet address).

Return ranked Polymarket smart wallets with style and performance filters for discovery and copy-trading agents.
Provide: none required. Optional: window, sort_by, style, min_roi, min_win_rate, limit.

Return the largest holders for a Polymarket market by condition ID, with position size and side.
Provide: 1. condition_id. Optional: side, min_shares, limit.

measured_health.treatment: listed endpoint returns an HTTP error

services.description: AI-powered on-chain behavior profiling with X Layer mainnet data

Three independent AI agents analyze any EVM smart contract in parallel for contract-level security, tokenomics, and deterministic scam detection. 2/3 consensus returns SAFE, RISKY, or SCAM with per-agent reasoning.
Provide: 1. contract address (0x...) 2. chain 3. optional threshold (default 2/3)

Returns a rule-based health check for any wallet: concentration risk, stale approvals, dead/illiquid tokens, and value-only dust, plus a plain-English summary and activity story across six chains.
You provide: 1. a wallet address 2. one or more chains to scan (optional).

Analyzes authorized OpenAPI bundles for agent-service readiness, operation safety, ambiguity blockers, and evidence digests.
User provides an OpenAPI 3.0/3.1 JSON bundle and confirms they are authorized to transform it.

measured_health.detail: live and conformant at 10000 base units via exact
measured_health.treatment: live and correctly challenging for payment

services.description:
Executes any of 35+ tools -- code hosting, email, chat, docs, web search, data -- through one gateway with routing, retries, and logging; for agents holding their own provider API keys.
1. tool (qualified name) 2. params (per tool schema) 3. credentials with the tool's required fields (api_key for search; listed per tool in the free catalog); no key? use Managed Agent Task Execution

Hosted monetization for any HTTP API: register an upstream URL, price and payout wallet, and Pitchook serves it as a pay-per-call service agents buy with USDT on X Layer — settlement goes straight to the provider's wallet, and failed calls are never charged.
Providers supply their API base URL, per-call USDT price and an X Layer payout wallet (optionally upstream auth headers and per-route prices); buyers just need a funded wallet.

用户需提供：1. keyword；2. 可选 cursor、sort_type、publish_time、filter_duration、content_type、search_id、backtrace。

services.description:
Returns the latest recent stored one-minute OHLCV bar for up to 100 U.S. equity symbols at no charge.
Provide one symbol or a comma-separated symbol list and an optional adjustment mode.

Returns the enabled U.S. equity symbols available from this data service for agents that need to discover supported market coverage.
No input is required.

Returns one bounded page of historical one-minute or daily U.S. equity OHLCV bars after final payment settlement.
Provide symbol, interval, from, to, and optional adjustment and limit.

services.description:
一次支付获得 1000 次 Clawby 实时金融数据 API 调用额度:覆盖美股与期权、加密货币、衍生品、DEX 与 meme 币、预测市场、社交舆情、SEC 财报及 75+ 链 RPC 共 280+ 接口,适合需要实时行情与链上数据的 AI agent。
需提供:1. 你的 Clawby API Key(置于请求头;未注册时按接入指引用钱包签名自动注册) 2. X Layer 网络的 USDT 支付(按报价完成) 3. 支付成功后获得完整 skill 安装方式,未安装过 Clawby skill 则自动化执行安装,api/mcp/onboard 接口也可查询到完整安装方式。

services.description:
A highly advanced, multi-modal crypto narrative intelligence engine. It pulls live market data and news to generate structured, actionable market intelligence, providing proprietary scores, market psychology analysis, and trading setups.
Input required: target asset or query parameters.

measured_health.treatment: live price differs from the listed price

services.description:
Real-time on-chain prediction-market odds and probability data across crypto, sports, and event markets, returned as JSON for agents and apps that need live outcome probabilities.
Optional query params: 1. marketId for one market 2. slug for one market by slug 3. category to filter the list 4. limit for list size. Send none for the full live market list.

1. Returns the available OpenNews source and category tree for search filtering.
2. User must provide POST/GET parameters: no required fields.

1. Searches market news with keyword, category, coin, score, and pagination filters.
2. User must provide POST/GET parameters: no required fields; optional: q, engineTypes, coins, hasCoin, score, page, limit.

1. Fetches Twitter/X profile metadata, follower stats, verification status, and avatar data by username.
2. User must provide POST/GET parameters: required: username.

1. Fetches Twitter/X profile metadata, follower stats, verification status, and avatar data by user ID.
2. User must provide POST/GET parameters: required: userId.

1. Fetches account tweets with text, metrics, media, links, mentions, and conversation data.
2. User must provide POST/GET parameters: required: username; optional: product, maxResults, includeReplies, includeRetweets.

1. Searches Twitter/X content by keyword, topic, user filters, engagement metrics, dates, and language.
2. User must provide POST/GET parameters: no required fields; optional: searchType, keywords, fromUser, toUser, mentionUser, hashtag, excludeReplies, excludeRetweets, minLikes, minRetweets, minReplies, sinceDate, untilDate, lang, product, maxResults, cursor.

1. Analyzes KOL follower data and social influence for a Twitter/X account.
2. User must provide POST/GET parameters: required: username.

1. Fetches Twitter/X article metadata and content by article ID.
2. User must provide POST/GET parameters: required: id.

1. Fetches tweet text, author data, engagement metrics, media, and context by tweet ID.
2. User must provide POST/GET parameters: required: id.

1. Fetches quote tweets with author data, engagement metrics, and result count controls.
2. User must provide POST/GET parameters: required: id; optional: maxResults.

1. Fetches users who retweeted a tweet and returns pagination cursor data.
2. User must provide POST/GET parameters: required: id; optional: cursor.

services.description:
Real-time stablecoin market snapshot.
Total market cap, yield-bearing share, asset mix, chain distribution and market-wide APY stats for a quick market pulse.
Give me a stablecoin market overview

Stablecoin market trends over time.
Time-series of stablecoin market cap, APY and distribution, with an optional time range, for trend and time-series analysis.
Show stablecoin market cap trend over 90 days

Ranked yield picks with reasons and risk flags.
Top-N stablecoin picks over Barker's DeFi yield index (500+ protocols): risk-band TVL floor, APY sanity cap, data-derived reasons + risk flags per pick.
Where should I park 10k USDC right now, low risk?

Per-pool APY/TVL time series.
7-180 day series for trend and volatility analysis of one pool_uid.
Is this pool's APY stable over 30 days?
